Aviation Data Visualization Hub: Monthly Civil Aviation Indicators Data Visualization: 71-607-X2024006 Description: This data visualization dashboard provides information on the main financial and operational data from Canadian Level I air carriers in an interactive format. The dashboard features ... Description: This data visualization dashboard provides information on the main financial and operational data from Canadian Level I air carriers in an interactive format. The dashboard features information on passengers, load factor, passenger-kilometres, available seat kilometres, hours flown, turbo fuel consumed, and total operating revenue. More Release date: 2026-05-28
- 2. Aviation Data Visualization Hub: Aircraft Movements Data Visualization: 71-607-X2024007 Description: This data visualization dashboard provides data on aircraft movements at Canada's major airports and select small airports in an interactive format. It allows users to compare aircraft ... Description: This data visualization dashboard provides data on aircraft movements at Canada's major airports and select small airports in an interactive format. It allows users to compare aircraft movements by geography, class of operation, type of operation, sector (domestic, transborder and other international) and the busiest airports by amount of aircraft activity. More Release date: 2026-05-28

It allows users to view financial, operating, employment and freight ... Description: This data visualization dashboard provides annual data on Canadian rail transportation in an interactive format. It allows users to view financial, operating, employment and freight data over time on railways operating in Canada and by mainline and regional railways. More Release date: 2026-04-28

Light and medium-duty vehicle registrations: Interactive dashboard Data Visualization: 71-607-X2022023 Description: This interactive dashboard provides a snapshot of the number of active vehicle registrations counts of light and medium-duty vehicles by vehicle type and fuel type. Data are obtained ... Description: This interactive dashboard provides a snapshot of the number of active vehicle registrations counts of light and medium-duty vehicles by vehicle type and fuel type. Data are obtained from the administrative files from provincial and territorial governments. More Release date: 2025-10-17
- 5. Canadian Public Transit Network Database Table: 23-26-0003 Description: The Canadian Public Transit Network Database consolidates General Transit Feed Specification (GTFS) static schedule data from 150 transit agencies across Canada into a single dataset. ... Description: The Canadian Public Transit Network Database consolidates General Transit Feed Specification (GTFS) static schedule data from 150 transit agencies across Canada into a single dataset. The dataset includes core GTFS components: Agency, stops, routes, trips, stop times, and service calendars. Additionally, a geospatial file export is provided to support use in mapping and spatial analysis applications. The dataset is available under the Open Government Licence - Canada. More Release date: 2025-07-30
- 6. Canadian Cycling Network Database Table: 23-26-0004 Description: The Canadian Cycling Network Database is a dataset of cycling infrastructure from 75 municipalities and regions across the country, compiled from open data sources. It standardizes ... Description: The Canadian Cycling Network Database is a dataset of cycling infrastructure from 75 municipalities and regions across the country, compiled from open data sources. It standardizes municipal cycling network data and classifies it using the Canadian Bikeway Comfort and Safety (Can-BICS) system, which categorizes infrastructure into high, medium, and low comfort levels to assess the safety and comfort of cycling routes. The dataset includes five primary bikeway types that conform to Can-BICS standards: cycle tracks, bike paths, local street bikeways, multi-use paths, and painted bike lanes. It also includes three non-conforming types: local shared roads, major shared roads, and multi-use gravel trails. An accompanying data dictionary translates municipal definitions into standardized Can-BICS categories. The dataset is available under the Open Government License - Canada. More Release date: 2025-07-30
- 7. Aviation Data Visualization Hub: Airport Activity Data Visualization: 71-607-X2024019 Description: This data visualization dashboard provides information on passengers enplaned and deplaned and cargo loaded and unloaded, at Canadian airports. It allows users to view passenger and ... Description: This data visualization dashboard provides information on passengers enplaned and deplaned and cargo loaded and unloaded, at Canadian airports. It allows users to view passenger and cargo data over time, by geography, by sector (domestic, transborder and other international) and at the top Canadian airports. More Release date: 2025-07-29
- 8. Housing and transportation cost index Table: 46-10-0090-01 Geography: Canada, Province or territory, Census subdivision Frequency: Occasional Description: A novel index for estimating the expense of housing and transportation in Canada has been developed, based on the Center for Neighborhood Technology’s Housing + Transportation (H+T®) ... Description: A novel index for estimating the expense of housing and transportation in Canada has been developed, based on the Center for Neighborhood Technology’s Housing + Transportation (H+T®) Affordability Index. By combining census data and data from other statistical programs we obtain a composite index (the H+T Index) for all aggregate dissemination areas of Canada, except for territories and First Nations. More Release date: 2025-06-06
- 9. Housing and Transportation Cost Index: Aggregate Dissemination Areas Table: 46-10-0091-01 Geography: Canada, Province or territory, Aggregate Dissemination Area Frequency: Occasional Description: A novel index for estimating the expense of housing and transportation in Canada has been developed, based on the Center for Neighborhood Technology’s Housing + Transportation (H+T®) ... Description: A novel index for estimating the expense of housing and transportation in Canada has been developed, based on the Center for Neighborhood Technology’s Housing + Transportation (H+T®) Affordability Index. By combining Census data and data from other statistical programs we obtain a composite index (the H+T Index) for all Aggregate Dissemination Areas of Canada, except for Territories and First Nations. This table uses the methodology of table 46100090, calculated on Aggregate Dissemination Areas. More Release date: 2025-06-06
- 10. Businesses' primary mode of transportation when transporting goods from one province or territory to another over the last 12 months Table: 33-10-0963-01 Geography: Canada Frequency: Occasional Description: Businesses' primary mode of transportation when transporting goods from one province or territory to another over the last 12 months, by North American Industry Classification System ... Description: Businesses' primary mode of transportation when transporting goods from one province or territory to another over the last 12 months, by North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) and business employment size. More Release date: 2025-03-03

Canadian Cycling Network Database Table: 23-26-0004 Description: The Canadian Cycling Network Database is a dataset of cycling infrastructure from 75 municipalities and regions across the country, compiled from open data sources. It standardizes ... Description: The Canadian Cycling Network Database is a dataset of cycling infrastructure from 75 municipalities and regions across the country, compiled from open data sources. It standardizes municipal cycling network data and classifies it using the Canadian Bikeway Comfort and Safety (Can-BICS) system, which categorizes infrastructure into high, medium, and low comfort levels to assess the safety and comfort of cycling routes. The dataset includes five primary bikeway types that conform to Can-BICS standards: cycle tracks, bike paths, local street bikeways, multi-use paths, and painted bike lanes. It also includes three non-conforming types: local shared roads, major shared roads, and multi-use gravel trails. An accompanying data dictionary translates municipal definitions into standardized Can-BICS categories. The dataset is available under the Open Government License - Canada. More Release date: 2025-07-30

The Sort by feature provides four options:
- By date – sorts results by product release date starting with the most recent.
- By most popular – gives priority to results that are most frequently selected by users, followed by the most recent.
- By relevance is only needed or beneficial when you use the search box and submit a search query. Results are ordered by a combination of where the search term appears in the content, e.g., if it appears in the title, it likely means the product is more relevant to your search; how up to date or new the content in the product is; how popular the product is; and other factors.
- By title – sorts results alphabetically.
The Sort by feature provides three options:
- By date – sorts results by product release date starting with the most recent.
- By relevance is only needed or beneficial when you use the search box and submit a search query. - You can initiate a search by entering keywords or selecting filters (e.g., under Subject, Geography , etc.) on the left side of the page.

- To start a new search, click on the Clear all button above the search box or deselect each filter.
